name: Shadow
flavor: This Heartless often travels in a group. Finish off a swarm quickly with an all-encompassing attack or special attack!

name: Soldier
flavor: Power Medals are most effective against this enemy. Defeat it before it unleashes a strong offensive attack.

name: Flower Rider
flavor: Don't let its appearance deceive you. This flower definitely has thorns! It also inflicts enemies with sleep and heals its allies.

name: Aerial Knocker
flavor: This Heartless really packs a punch! Defeat it with a special attack before it can land a hit.

name: Dire Plant
flavor: Possesses high strength and special attacks with healing capabilities. Get to the root of the problem with a strong offensive!

name: Yellow Opera
flavor: This enemy temporarily increases its strength before unleashing an attack. Use Speed Medals to eliminate it on the double!

name: Bandit
flavor: Thick as thieves. If attacked by a band of bandits, defeat them one by one before they can launch a simultaneous attack!

name: Possessor
flavor: This fog-like fiend travels in a herd and inflicts status ailments like poison. Clear the air with an all-encompassing attack or special attack!

name: Large Body
flavor:
With high HP and defense on its side, this oversized adversary is
one colossal challenge. Fill your
special attack gauge beforehand!

name: Red Bandit
flavor:
This tough bandit strengthens
and heals its comrades. Its own HP is low, so defeat it with a special attack before it gets away red-handed!

name: Red Nocturne
flavor: A support-type enemy that boosts the strength of its allies. Defeat it before it has the chance!

name: Tornado Step
flavor:
This Heartless boasts a tough offensive and healing powers.
Use a special attack to defeat it
quickly!

name: Nosy Mole
flavor:
This mole is nothing to sneeze at!
It has more HP than a Shadow and sometimes lands critical hits. Guard your remaining HP closely!

name: Candy Apple
flavor: Though it looks sweet, this is one bad apple. Equip Medals with healing capabilities before taking on this powerful and poisonous fiend.

name: Wizard
flavor: This Heartless is a double threat with its high attack power and abundance of HP. Defeat it before it has a chance to use its boosts!

name: Bag O' Jewels
flavor: A mixed bag of good and bad. This enemy heals its allies and attacks with the precious gems atop its head.

name: Fat Bandit
flavor: This big bandit boosts its own strength before unleashing a heavy-handed attack. Use special attacks to overcome its assault!

name: Blue Rhapsody
flavor: This Heartless works in harmony with its allies by healing them, though it does not have much HP itself.

name: Air Soldier
flavor: A well-balanced Heartless. Beware as it lashes out with a powerful attack when its HP is low!

name: Loudmouth
flavor: Inflicts sleep on its enemies. Defeat it quickly before it makes a sitting duck out of you!

name: Loudmouth
flavor: Inflicts sleep on its enemies. Defeat it quickly before it makes a sitting duck out of you!

name: Armored Knight
flavor: When in a pinch, this Heartless throws caution and itself to the wind. Boost your defenses before taking on this formidable foe!

name: Wibble Wobble
flavor: A precarious and powerful enemy. Use special attacks to knock it down to size!

name: Large Armor
flavor: A walking fortress, this Heartless boasts both high offense and defense. Use a special attack to weaken its guard before striking it down!

name: Armored Archer
flavor: A Heartless with low defenses. Use special attacks to defeat it quickly as it unleashes critical attacks in succession when its HP is low.

name: Rainy Loudmouth
flavor: Inflicts enemies with paralysis. If you encounter this Heartless in a group, defeat it first before it toots its own horn!

name: Bag O' Coins
flavor:
Not all that glitters is gold. This tough opponent uses the coins
atop its head to launch a powerful offensive against enemies.

name: Bag O' Coal
flavor:
Adds fuel to the fire by boosting
its comrades' attack power. Extinguish the flames one by one
or risk taking heavy damage!

name: Neoshadow
flavor: A fearsome foe and jack-of-all-trades boasting boosted attack power, poison, and more. Charge your special attack gauge before engaging in this battle!

name: Defender
flavor:
This Heartless lives by the
words "the best offense is a
good defense." Utilize your
special attacks to overcome its
mighty guard, then claim victory!

name: Creeper Plant
flavor: A plant-like Heartless which inflicts opponents with status ailments. Equip recovery Medals and use special attacks to nip it in the bud!

name: Fire Plant
flavor: This fiery flower paralyzes opponents and boosts its own strength during battle.

name: Darkball
flavor:
Boasting high HP and strength,
this sinister Heartless boosts
its stats even further and lowers
those of opponents to gain
an edge in battle.

name: Chomper Egg
flavor: This powerful Heartless is all bite and no bark. Strike it down before it can lower your defense and retaliate!

name: Wretched Witch
flavor: A wily witch wielding potent poison apples as weapons. Using special attacks with healing capabilities is recommended.

name: Poison Apple
flavor: Rotten to the core, this apple-like enemy powers up its allies and assails opponents with strong attacks.

name: Morning Star
flavor: When its HP gets low, it can raise its defenses and heal itself. Use a defense-decreasing special attack before attacking and it'll be seeing stars!

name: Gargoyle
flavor: This winged Heartless stuns foes and negates status effects. Use Medals with high attack power to bring it down!

name: High Wizard
flavor: Speed-type special attacks work like magic on this Heartless! Fill your special attack gauge before challenging this mighty wizard.

name: Black Gummi Copter
flavor: A powerful enemy specializing in Speed-type attacks. Use special attacks to strengthen your defense against its speedy offense!

name: Blue Gummi Copter
flavor: Possesses high defense against Magic-type attacks. Use Speed Medals or decrease its attribute defenses before making your assault!

name: Red Gummi Copter
flavor: Equip Magic Medals or use special attacks to lower your opponent's attribute defenses before attacking this Power-type Heartless!

name: Yellow Gummi Copter
flavor: Launch a Power-type offensive against this Heartless, or decrease its attribute defenses with special attacks!

name: Gummi Hammer
flavor: An enemy with high attribute defenses. Defeat it with special attacks before it can raise its defenses any higher!

name: Invisible
flavor: This nightmarish Heartless wields a large sword with ease and launches an all-out attack when its HP is low.

name: Violet Waltz
flavor: This support-type Heartless heals and boosts the defenses of its allies. Be wary if it appears with more formidable foes.

name: Ice Plant
flavor: Though rooted to the spot, this plant-like Heartless is far from defenseless. It utilizes sleep, healing, and Magic-type special attacks to take on opponents from afar.

name: Dark Plant
flavor: This Heartless will try to lower your defenses, but use special attacks to bring it back up!

name: Pretender
flavor: Disguised as a treasure chest, this Heartless hoards Lux and Evolve Medals. Beware of its surprise attacks.

name: Great Pretender
flavor: Disguised as a treasure chest, this Heartless hoards Lux and Evolve Medals. Beware of its surprise attacks.

name: King Pretender
flavor: Disguised as a treasure chest, this Heartless hoards Lux and Evolve Medals. Beware of its surprise attacks.

name: Growth Egg
flavor: A rare enemy that drops EXP Medals. Don't let it escape!

name: Munny Egg
flavor: A rare enemy that drops Munny Medals. Don't let it escape!

name: Prize Egg
flavor: A rare enemy that drops materials, EXP Medals, and Evolve Medals! Don't let it escape!

name: Bad Dog
flavor: Don't let this dog have its day! Defeat it before it has a chance to use its paralyzing attacks.

name: Cloud
flavor: This contender packs a serious punch on his second turn. Defeat him before he can unleash it, or find another way to stay in the game!

name: Cerberus
flavor: A colossal canine with a lot of HP. Find a way to withstand its first turn before launching your counterattack. Prove that three heads aren't better than one!

name: Hades
flavor: The ruler of the Underworld. He boosts his defenses on his second turn, so wait until it wears off or counter it with your own special attacks to put out this fire.

name: Playing Cards
flavor: The cards may be stacked against you, but don't give up! Make it past their second attack and play your own cards right to claim victory!

name: Possessors
flavor: A swarm of Heartless this smoky can't be good for your health! They inflict various status ailments, so bring the proper Medals to remedy the situation.

name: Aeroplane
flavor:
This self-propelled pilot trades defense for offense on the fly.
Take it down before it gets the chance!

name: Search Ghost
flavor: A spooky specter for more than one reason. It boasts boosted strength, so dispel the effects or else you won't stand a ghost of a chance!

name: Hook Bat
flavor: This bat boosts its attribute strength and Power-type defense. Dispel the effects or use neutral special attacks and you'll be off the hook in no time!

name: Minute Bomb
flavor: Don't let its size fool you! This tough-bodied Heartless doesn't take damage easily, so equip Medals that deal fixed damage or have high hit counts.

name: Red Rose
flavor: A flower with a lot of power. Weed it out before it boosts its strength and blossoms into a whole new problem.

name: White Rose
flavor: This rose definitely has thorns, boasting high HP, healing abilities, and sleep-inducing attacks! Cut it down to size before it becomes a thorn in your side!

name: Nimble Bee
flavor: A busy bee that raises the attack power of all allies. Exterminate this pest before it stings back!

name: Stinging Bee
flavor: This intimidating insect boosts its offense before striking enemies with its steel-like stinger. Bee afraid. Bee very afraid...

name: Cannon Gun
flavor: This steely Heartless delivers a destructive blow during its third turn. You don't want to be around when it blasts off, so douse its fuse while there's still time!

name: Hammer Frame
flavor: Paralyzes its foes and boosts its strength and defense when low on HP. Hammer away at this Heartless with special attacks before it has a chance to act!

name: Wyvern
flavor: A high-flying Heartless with HP and strength to match. Dispel its status enhancements or paralyze it to bring it down to earth!

name: sEnm_2001
flavor: sEnf_2001

name: Master Ava
flavor: Cunning as a fox, this fearsome foreteller boasts boosted stats all around. She also drops plentiful attack prizes, so use your special attacks to claim victory!

name: Gargoyle Knight
flavor: A sword-bearing statue. It unleashes a fearsome attack when its HP is low, so use a powerful Medal to stop it stone-cold!

name: Wayward Wardrobe
flavor: A fashion-forward Heartless that boosts its magic defense. Use Speed Medals to take it out in style!

name: Mega-Shadow
flavor: This mega-monster has its guard down for the first 2 turns. Defeat it quickly before it unleashes a mega-dose of damage!

name: Gigas Shadow
flavor: This Heartless's HP gauge is as monstrous as the creature itself! When it increases its strength, use special attacks to remove any boosts as quickly as possible.

name: sEnm_0157
flavor: This hot-headed Heartless lowers your defense, but keep your cool. Skills like Paralysis and Defense Boost will help you defeat and calm this angry monster!

name: Blue Copter Fleet
flavor: A testament to the saying "there's safety in numbers." This squad boasts high power and magic defense, so use speed or neutral attacks to bring them down!

name: Red Copter Fleet
flavor: A testament to the saying "there's safety in numbers." This squad boasts high power and speed defense, so use magic or neutral attacks to bring them down!

name: Yellow Copter Fleet
flavor: A testament to the saying "there's safety in numbers." This squad boasts high speed and magic defense, so use power or neutral attacks to bring them down!

name: Black Copter Fleet
flavor: This mob is literally a handful―of Black Gummi Copters! Keep Dispel on hand and be prepared to remove any attribute boosts.

name: Darkside
flavor: With lots of HP and the use of various status enhancements, this colossal creature is one tough cookie. Dispel and Medals with healing capabilities are the key!

name: Pester Jester
flavor: This monster is no joke, it'll lower your strength and paralyze you. But don't be fooled, its attacks are weak so take out its troupe first!

name: Jack O' Lantern
flavor: Increases all attribute defenses on the first turn. Wait until the effects disappear, dispel them yourself, or attack with a neutral special attack!

name: Jack O' Lantern
flavor: Increases all attribute defenses on the first turn. Wait until the effects disappear, dispel them yourself, or attack with a neutral special attack!

name: Jack O' Lantern
flavor: Increases all attribute defenses on the first turn. Wait until the effects disappear, dispel them yourself, or attack with a neutral special attack!

name: Pumpkin Soldier
flavor: Possessing an almost impenetrable defense, this enemy's strength grows with every turn. Find its weak point before its too late!

name: Pumpkin Soldier
flavor: Possessing an almost impenetrable defense, this enemy's strength grows with every turn. Find its weak point before its too late!

name: Pumpkin Soldier
flavor: Possessing an almost impenetrable defense, this enemy's strength grows with every turn. Find its weak point before its too late!

name: Gift Shadow
flavor: The best things come in small packages! This festive Heartless drops plenty of attack prizes, so fill your gauge, then launch your attack!

name: Terrible Tomte
flavor: A gift-bearing Heartless with a bag of tricks. Collect the attack prizes it drops and defeat it before it can lull you to sleep!

name: Strange Tree
flavor: Shaking this peculiar pine will earn you plenty attack prizes, but beware! You'll be sleeping like a log if this tree gets its way! With bark this bad, does it need to bite?

name: Storming Sheep
flavor: This Heartless appears in herds and uses sleep-inducing attacks. Defeat them quickly with special attacks or you'll be counting sheep!

name: Storming Sheep
flavor: This Heartless appears in herds and uses sleep-inducing attacks. Defeat them quickly with special attacks or you'll be counting sheep!

name: Round Rice Cake
flavor: The name of the game is speed—Speed Medals, that is. Equip as many as you can; otherwise, you may find yourself in a sticky situation!

name: Lion Dancer
flavor: Utilize your Magic Medals against this deft dancer. When up against a troupe, all-encompassing attacks are also effective!

name: Cheery Ape
flavor: This Heartless doesn't monkey around! It boasts high HP, so feel free to go bananas with your special attacks!

name: Large Rice Cake
flavor: The longer the battle, the tougher they get. Defeat them in the first turn before they get a chance to boost their defense. Pound away, and don't choke under the pressure!

name: Bitter Macaron
flavor: A colorful enemy that boosts its attack power. Use special attacks to bring a sweet end to the bitter battle!

name: Creeper Bouqet
flavor: Don't let yourself be wilted by this harmless-looking Heartless! Defeat it before it can casts sleep on you.

name: Chocolate Gargoyle
flavor: An unpleasant surprise lies beneath its sweet, chocolate exterior. With high strength and defense, this fierce Heartless will satisfy your craving for a tough battle!

name: Prank Bouquet
flavor: The joke's on you if you underestimate this beautiful bouquet! Defeat it before it can cast sleep on its first turn.

name: Mighty Macaron
flavor: This tough cookie is as sweet as it is sour. Get past its raised defenses is with an even tougher offensive, or use a special attack to dispel the effects.

name: White Chocolate Statue
flavor: An unpleasant surprise lies beneath its sweet, white chocolate exterior. Dispel its strength boosts or heighten your offense to serve this enemy its just deserts!

name: Eggster Bunny
flavor: While you're distracted by its basket of goodies, this fierce little bunny will lower your defense and hit you with critical attacks. Defeat it ASAP!

name: Eggcognito
flavor: A rare enemy that increases your chances of encountering a Raid Boss. Don't let it escape!

name: Shenaneggan
flavor: A rare enemy that drops Event Coins. Don't let it escape!

name: Eggscapade
flavor: An enemy as frightful as it is fabulous. Don't let it use its power of paralysis; defeat it before its turn!

name: Pink Possessor
flavor: This flowering monster will try to put you to sleep during its first turn. Don't let yourself be hypnotized by its pretty-in-pink appearance!

name: Pink Possessor
flavor: This flowering monster will try to put you to sleep during its first turn. Don't let yourself be hypnotized by its pretty-in-pink appearance!

name: Wind-Up Leaf Cake
flavor: A soft and sweet exterior belies a hardened foe with high defenses. Take down this support-type enemy before it can heal its allies and reinforce their resistance!

name: Swordsman
flavor: Stay sharp as this wily warrior uses poison. Guard your HP closely as you match blades and prove once and for all that the key is mightier than the sword!

name: Gilled Glider
flavor: There might be many fish in the sea, but this one thrives in the sky! Watch out for its high HP and use special attacks to bring it down before it can sap your strength.

name: Armed Warrior
flavor: A tenacious threat that thrives in long battles. Use special attacks to smash through its iron defenses and bring it down in two turns!

name: Huge Snowman
flavor: An abominable adversary that lowers your defenses. Keep an eye on your HP and mirror its status enhancements to bring the heat to battle!
